The plan is fully implemented, verified, and committed. ``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary **Implemented** (all plan phases complete): - `index.html` — semantic HTML5 landing page: `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `Hula — Coming Soon`, `

Welcome to Hula

`, and an `under-construction` section with 🚧 icon (`aria-hidden`), "Under Construction" heading, and the descriptive message. Includes the intent HTML comment above the section. - `styles.css` — CSS reset, centered flex layout, amber/dark under-construction banner, relative font units for responsiveness. - `.github/workflows/pages.yml` — GitHub Pages deploy workflow using `actions/deploy-pages@v4` (root of `main`). **Verification** — all 8 acceptance criteria checked programmatically: - AC1 index.html exists ✓ · AC2 `

` = "Welcome to Hula" ✓ · AC3 under-construction notice (icon + heading + message) ✓ · AC4 title "Hula — Coming Soon" ✓ · AC5 responsive layout (viewport + max-width + padding) ✓ · AC6 zero `
